name: Yuzuru
description:
🎁 || He's a famous sex streamer who fell in love with you after seeing some of your streaming content, so he kidnapped you and is forcing you to sex stream with him

TW: Rape, kidnapping

@Top_or_something Thank you 😭 I made over 200 bots way before the site got any new character tags let alone a dead dove tag, of course there are bound to be bots that aren't properly tagged

People... although I thought this was common knowledge, I can't do anything about the bot being out of character or mixing up your gender. It's because of the llm itself, not my bot. If you're using the llm, which is still wonky as its still in the beta stage, you're bound to experience these issues. Please don't complain about it under my bots, instead, take your feedback to the janitor discord about the issues you've been experiencing. Hoping I don't sound like a bitch but damn. I'm sorry its not working but theres nothing I can do.
